summary: The session explores Aylen's struggle against a tormenting entity that manipulates her fears and desires. Aylen develops a test to confirm her reality and ultimately confides in her friend Sarah, seeking support in her battle against the entity's influence.
facts: Aylen experiences vivid nightmares and visions of a tormenting entity that takes the form of her friend Sarah. The entity taunts Aylen, claiming it enjoys watching her suffer and has plans to destroy the world. Aylen develops a test to confirm her reality, similar to a concept from the movie "Inception." Aylen successfully performs the test with Sarah, confirming they are in the real world. After the test, Aylen opens up to Sarah about her fears and the visions she has experienced. Sarah reassures Aylen that she believes her and will help her confront the entity.
